name: mojo-test-count-guard
description: Add a pre-commit hook to enforce a per-file Mojo test function limit and prevent heap-corruption crashes. Use when: (1) a Mojo runtime bug causes crashes above N cumulative tests in a single file, (2) implementing ADR-009 Phase 2 safeguards to block accidental limit regression, (3) adding automated enforcement after a manual file-splitting workaround.
